eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Summit, CO; at 01:01 PM ON APR 6, 2026 Effective until 03:01 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Breckenridge Police: The evacuation order has been cancelled for the area of South Main St - Breckenridge.

Individuals may return to this area. Individuals may return to the area of South Main St - Breckenridge
